name: Potato-Crusted Cauliflower Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 medium cauliflower, cut into small florets
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the shredded potatoes in a colander. Sprinkle with salt and let sit for 10 minutes.
2. Squeeze out the excess water from the potatoes.
3. Combine the potatoes, egg, and grated onion to form a dough-like mixture.
4. Pat the dough into a well-greased 9-inch pie pan, building up sides using floured fingers.
5. Bake at 400°F for 40-45 minutes until browned.
6. Spray with cooking oil spray after 30 minutes of baking.
7. Sauté onions and garlic in butter for 5 minutes.
8. Add herbs, cauliflower, and cook for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Spread half of the shredded cheese into the crust, then add the vegetables and remaining cheese.
10. Whisk eggs and skim milk together and pour over the filling.
11. Sprinkle with paprika.
12. Bake at 400°F for another 35-40 minutes until set.
